title: neosasamorpha hosomiana
intro: Neosasamorpha hosomiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae, native to Japan, and is also known as Japanese gentian. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Neosasamorpha hosomiana is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. The plant's roots and stems are commonly used in herbal preparations, often dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions.
